summary: The diff implements changes to support icon-only drag (REQ-1), fixed label positions, and layer ordering (REQ-3). However, REQ-2 (vertical centering of text labels relative to icon position) is not clearly implemented — the label is placed at a fixed offset below the icon at creation time (labelY: y + 56 + 10), which is a fixed offset, not dynamic vertical centering. REQ-3 layer ordering evidence is not visible in the truncated diff. REQ-1 appears implemented via labelX/labelY staying fixed on onMoveIcon.

missing_requirements.requirement: Text labels on the canvas must be centered vertically relative to the icon's position.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows label position is set once at creation (labelY: y + 56 + 10) and never updated. There is no evidence of dynamic vertical centering logic — the label is placed at a fixed pixel offset below the icon, not centered vertically relative to the icon image. No centering calculation is visible in the available code.

missing_requirements.requirement: All drawings and icons must always render on top of uploaded background images; uploaded image must be the bottom-most layer.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff is truncated and the rendering order in AttackPathCanvas.tsx is not visible. There is no evidence in the visible diff portions showing that images are explicitly rendered before drawings/icons via z-index management or JSX rendering order placing images first.
